meta.note: Office cards for the Contact page (one row per category tab)
Stable identifier used as tab key (e.g. slovakia, china, lions)
Top label on the tab (e.g. SLOVAKIA)
Subtitle on the tab (e.g. Corporate Headquarters)
Small tag next to org name (e.g. CENTRAL EUROPE)
Person name shown under the role label
One per line as Label: Value (e.g. IČO: 54 011 230)
One per line as Label: Value (e.g. IBAN: SK15...)
